mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE;
select * from app_user t1 where t1.id=#{userId} for update
select * from app_user t1 left join app_user_plus t2 on t1.id=t2.user_id where t2.id is null
mapper.update: update app_user set balck=1 where username IN ( SELECT a.username FROM ( SELECT t3.username username from app_b_user t2 LEFT JOIN app_user t3 on t2.username=t3.username where t3.balck!=1 )a )
